ModMetaData.name: Custom Woods - Vanilla
ModMetaData.author: Shotu
ModMetaData.description:
This mod adds 22 new vanilla-based wood types (eg. Oak, Maple, Teak, Poplar etc.), each with different stats and color. Just harvest them from a corresponding vanilla tree (no, not you Cactus, you're not considered as a tree). With these new wood you can craft weapons, building, floors, bridges and more!
These wood will be used as a fuel for campfire, torches and other stuff.
Also this mod adds a small "flavor" to the game, that is a UI filtering list for floors, bridges and other wooden stuff. Also this filter works for most of the stony floors. No longer the game will show you that you can build a Marble floor while there's no marble around.
I've added a recipe which converts 2 custom wood into a vanilla Wood log. There is at least one thing you're gonna need it:
- Skylantern Festival
There are traders who have these new types of wood as well.
If you find any bugs, please report them via Steam.
